top_issues.issue: Broken multipart upload: lib/multipart.js produces a request-library array instead of FormData; optionhelper.js never assigns opts.multipart to ropts.body; Document/Attachment/ContentVersion inserts send empty-body requests silently

God Object / Divergent Change: 994-line file handles 7 unrelated concerns (constructor, auth getters/setters, OAuth flows, CRUD/query/search/streaming API methods, HTTP infrastructure, HTTP helper functions, Plugin system)

Parallel Connection definitions: prototype-based constructor in index.js (line 24) and ES6 class stub in lib/connection.js (line 5) are out of sync; only validateConnectionOptions is imported from lib/connection.js; TODO comment acknowledges incomplete migration
Timeout silently ignored for all API requests: AbortSignal.timeout() is applied only in _apiAuthRequest; _apiRequest has no timeout enforcement; optionhelper.js sets ropts.timeout which fetch ignores
Feature Envy: getApiRequestOptions reads 13 distinct fields from the caller's opts object (uri, resource, oauth, method, gzip, multipart, headers, body, qs, requestOpts, timeout, apiVersion, blob)
Deprecated querystring module: require('querystring') used at lines 3, 190, 242, 287; superseded by URLSearchParams in Node.js 22
Magic string hardcoded URL in getVersions (line 352): http://na1.salesforce.com/services/data/ uses HTTP not HTTPS, hardcodes a legacy pod, and bypasses all configurable endpoint logic
Non-functional gzip option: sets Accept-Encoding header but native fetch does not decompress responses; gzip:true will cause JSON parse failures if server honours the header
_changed Array uses O(n) Array.includes() for membership testing on every set() call; should be a Set for O(1) has() and automatic deduplication
previous() method uses truthiness check (if this._previous[field]) which returns undefined for falsy previous values (0, empty string, false) instead of the actual stored value
